description_long: This is a large, modern fire truck with a predominantly red and gray color scheme, featuring a robust rectangular body and a spacious cab for crew members. The vehicle is equipped with multiple compartments along its sides for storing firefighting equipment, as well as visible hose connections and control panels. On the roof, there are two prominent air conditioning units and emergency light bars, while the sides display a fire department insignia. A ladder rack is mounted on the right side, and the truck has large, heavy-duty wheels suitable for urban and suburban environments. The front of the truck is fitted with a wide windshield, side mirrors, and a siren housing above the grille. The overall design emphasizes functionality, durability, and high visibility for emergency response scenarios.
description: A large, red and gray fire truck with emergency lights, hose connections, a ladder rack, and fire department insignia, designed for urban firefighting and rescue operations.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back compartment doors, ladder rack, and rear emergency lights.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the ladder rack, hose connections, control panels, and fire department insignia.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide windshield, emergency lights, siren housing, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Left side view with visible hose connections, control panels, and storage compartments.
